meta.summary: Senior iOS Engineer with 12+ years building consumer and marketplace apps — from first commit to App Store, in startups and platform squads. I own architecture, SDK integration, and release. Recent work: watchOS voice AI R&D, Birmarket commerce, and turning Premium Subscription into a shared loyalty SDK. Feature modules stay independent of payment and analytics backends.
meta.summaryShort: Senior iOS Engineer with 12+ years building consumer and marketplace apps — from first commit to App Store, in startups and platform squads. I own architecture, SDK integration, and release. Recent work: watchOS voice AI R&D, Birmarket commerce, and turning Premium Subscription into a shared loyalty SDK. Feature modules stay independent of payment and analytics backends.

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Apple Watch Voice AI — R&D project
roles.productDescription: Apple Watch Voice AI — watchOS client with iPhone relay. Also beta-tested VelocityAI, GlobalLogic's AI-assisted SDLC platform.
roles.myRole: Senior iOS engineer on the watchOS client — architecture, Watch ↔ iPhone connectivity, TestFlight. Beta-tested VelocityAI separately; feedback from a shipping iOS perspective.
bullets: watchOS voice AI with on-device conversation flows.
No WebSocket on Watch — iPhone relay for audio and server sync; dedup with URLSessionWebSocketTask.
Split Watch/iPhone work around platform limits; TestFlight under watchOS constraints (background, audio, connectivity).
On-device intents refresh navigation and forms locally.
Beta-tested VelocityAI — ran a sample product cycle from idea to release.
bulletsShort: watchOS voice AI with on-device conversation flows.
iPhone relay for WebSocket/audio and on-device intents; TestFlight under watchOS limits.
Beta-tested VelocityAI — sample product cycle from idea to release; iOS engineer feedback.
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · WatchKit · WatchConnectivity · SwiftUI · URLSessionWebSocketTask · AVFoundation · AVAudioEngine · App Intents · Swift Concurrency · async/await · VelocityAI

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Birmarket — online marketplace & loyalty · Loyalty squad
roles.productDescription: Birmarket (Umico) — multi-vendor marketplace in Azerbaijan: 500,000+ products, 900+ pickup points, Bir Bonus loyalty. Joined at startup scale; shipped commerce and loyalty SDKs as the product grew nationally. Shared loyalty SDK embedded in multiple host apps.
roles.myRole: Senior iOS on Birmarket commerce and Loyalty squad — Premium Subscription, Analytics module, shared Premium Subscription SDK; per-app config for host apps.
bullets: Catalog through orders for 500,000+ SKUs and 900+ pickup points — multiple App Store releases.
Owned Premium Subscription — UI, checkout wiring, subscription status on the feature side.
Analytics module in loyalty SDK — one API for Amplitude, Mixpanel, AppsFlyer, Firebase, PostHog, Sentry.
Pulled Premium Subscription into a shared SDK with per-host configuration.
bulletsShort: Marketplace commerce — 500,000+ SKUs, 900+ pickup points, catalog through orders.
Owned Premium Subscription — UI, flows, shared purchase model.
Analytics in loyalty SDK — one API; features don't touch telemetry SDKs directly.
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · SwiftUI · UIKit · SPM · URLSession · Firebase Analytics · Firebase Crashlytics · Amplitude · Mixpanel · AppsFlyer · PostHog · Sentry · Keychain · Swift Concurrency · async/await · Combine
